query: Are romantic room setups only for hotels?
direct_answer: Porch & Party provides romantic room decorations in Memphis for anniversaries, hotel surprises, proposals, and private celebrations that need a warm, polished visual treatment.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area clients planning a romantic surprise and wanting the room styled before arrival without trying to coordinate all of the setup themselves.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
